title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund
summary: The DOJ declined to provide written assurance that it won't proceed with an 'anti-weaponization' fund established through President Trump's $10 billion IRS settlement, rebuffing a judge's request for documentation.
content: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.

zh.title: 司法部拒绝法官要求将不继续推进"反武器化"基金承诺写入文字
zh.summary: 司法部拒绝提供书面保证，不会继续推进通过特朗普总统100亿美元国税局和解案建立的"反武器化"基金，拒绝了法官要求提供文件记录的请求。

title: Trump unveils the new Air Force One, a converted Qatari jet
summary: Trump unveiled a converted Qatari aircraft as a temporary Air Force One replacement while new Boeing aircraft are being manufactured for presidential use.
content: The gift from Qatar is serving as a so-called "bridge" aircraft to carry the president until the new planes ordered directly from Boeing arrive.

zh.title: 特朗普揭幕新空军一号，一架改装的卡塔尔喷气飞机
zh.summary: 特朗普揭幕了一架改装的卡塔尔飞机，作为临时空军一号替代品，同时波音飞机正在为总统使用而制造中。

title: John Jumper to leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
summary: John Jumper is leaving Google DeepMind to join Anthropic as tech giants and AI startups intensify their competition for top talent in the race to develop advanced AI systems.
content: Tech giants including Meta and Alphabet, along with upstarts such as Anthropic and OpenAI, are locked in a talent war as they race to build next-gen AI systems.

zh.title: 约翰·朱珀将离开谷歌DeepMind加入Anthropic
zh.summary: 约翰·朱珀正在离开谷歌DeepMind加入Anthropic，因为科技巨头和人工智能初创公司在开发先进AI系统的竞争中加剧了对顶尖人才的争夺。

title: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as a national security threat
summary: Trump reversed his position on Anthropic, no longer considering it a national security threat after the company disabled access to its most advanced models in compliance with his order restricting foreign access.
content: Anthropic last week disabled access to its most advanced models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after Trump ordered it to block foreign ​nationals from accessing them.

zh.title: 特朗普告诉Axios他不再将Anthropic视为国家安全威胁
zh.summary: 特朗普改变了对Anthropic的立场，在该公司按照他的命令禁用最先进模型对外国的访问权限后，不再将其视为国家安全威胁。

title: My two sons will inherit a $30,000 annuity from their grandmother. What should I do with the money?
summary: Guidance on managing a $30,000 annuity inheritance for children, with beneficiaries having a five-year window to withdraw the funds.
content: “My understanding is that they have five years to withdraw the money.”

zh.title: 我的两个儿子将从祖母那里继承一笔3万美元的年金。我该如何处理这笔钱?
zh.summary: 关于如何管理为儿童留下的3万美元年金的指导，受益人有五年的时间来提取这些资金。

title: Employers to college students: Never mind that 4.0 GPA. Go out and get a summer job.
summary: Employers increasingly prioritize practical work experience over academic credentials, with studies showing college graduates with summer job experience are twice as likely to secure employment after graduation.
content: College students with any sort of work experience on their résumés are twice as likely to be employed shortly after graduating.

zh.title: 雇主对大学生说:别管那个4.0绩点了。去找份暑期工作吧。
zh.summary: 雇主越来越优先考虑实际工作经验而不是学术资历，研究表明拥有暑期工作经验的大学毕业生在毕业后获得就业机会的可能性是其两倍。

title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
summary: Wealthy parents seek advice on financially supporting their children without fostering dependency. The concern centers on avoiding long-term reliance while acknowledging potential mental health and economic challenges that could affect their children's financial independence.
content: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse.”

zh.title: "我们一向节俭"：我和妻子有钱，如何在帮助孩子的同时不毁掉他们的独立性？
zh.summary: 富有的父母寻求关于在经济上支持子女而不培养依赖心的建议。核心关切是避免长期依赖，同时认识到可能影响子女财务独立性的心理健康和经济挑战。

title: Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December
summary: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh is using newly established task forces to defer rate change decisions until December, citing ongoing investigations into various policy matters. The approach provides the Fed flexibility to postpone action on interest rates.
content: During his first press conference as Fed chair Wednesday, Kevin Warsh repeated one refrain in his answers to many reporters’ questions: A task force is looking into it.

zh.title: 沃什的新工作组为美联储提供灵活空间，将利率变化推迟至十二月
zh.summary: 美联储主席凯文·沃什利用新成立的工作组将利率变化决定推迟到十二月，理由是正在进行的各项政策事项调查。这种方法为美联储提供了灵活性，以延迟对利率的行动。

title: Fedspeak vs. war deal: Here are the things that drove this week's stock market
summary: The S&P 500 surged Thursday, recovering from earlier losses tied to central bank statements and international developments. The market's swing highlights how monetary policy communications and geopolitical deals drive significant trading activity.
content: The S&P 500 surged on Thursday, making up for losses seen after central bankers convened.

title: Meloni slams Trump's claim she 'begged' for a photo with him as Italy's top diplomat cancels U.S. trip
summary: Italian Prime Minister Meloni rejected Trump's claims that she requested a photo opportunity, characterizing the remarks as offensive to her and Italy. The diplomatic dispute prompted Italy's Foreign Minister to cancel a planned U.S. visit.
content: Italian Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani abruptly canceled a planned trip to the U.S., calling Trump's claims "serious and offensive" toward Meloni and Italy.

zh.title: 梅洛尼抨击特朗普声称她"恳求"与他合影 意大利外交官取消美国之行

title: Is the stock market closed today for Juneteenth? Will the post office deliver mail?
summary: Juneteenth, a federal holiday falling on Friday June 19, affects stock market trading hours and postal service operations. The article outlines specific impacts on financial markets and other government-related services.

summary: Oil prices are experiencing fresh volatility due to conflicting reports about the U.S.-Iran agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Regional tensions continue to create uncertainty about long-term stability in energy markets.

summary: Oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has increased following implementation of the U.S.-Iran deal to open the sea lane. The agreement raises questions about governance frameworks when the toll-free period concludes.

title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
summary: SpaceX's historic IPO created the largest market debut and sparked a surge in leveraged ETF demand, particularly in high-risk investment products. The unprecedented offering has driven speculative trading activity in derivative markets.
content: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.

summary: Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary has extended his contract through 2032 with bonus provisions potentially worth over £130 million. The deal reflects continued confidence in his leadership of the budget airline.

title: The Fed’s new hawkish reality just forced Goldman Sachs to slash its gold forecast by $500

zh.summary: 美联储主席凯文·沃什本被寄予降低利率的期望，但他反而发出了鹰派信号，专注于其他优先事项。这种偏离引发了对未来货币政策和市场影响的疑问。

title: Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up
summary: New housing reform plans will make sales agreements legally binding sooner and require sellers to provide more property information upfront. The changes aim to reduce unfair practices like gazumping in the UK real estate market.
content: Sales agreements will be legally binding sooner and making sellers provide more home information up front are part of the planned changes.

zh.title: 房屋销售改革计划通过具有约束力的协议来结束"抬价"现象
zh.summary: 新的住房改革计划将使销售协议更早具有法律约束力，并要求卖方提前提供更多房产信息。这些改革旨在减少英国房地产市场中"抬价"等不公平做法。

title: Social media declared Cursor dead. Then SpaceX handed the AI startup a $60 billion lifeline.
summary: SpaceX invested $60 billion in Cursor, an AI coding assistant that had been dismissed after Anthropic's Claude Code gained prominence. The funding positions Cursor to compete for leadership in the AI development tools market.
content: Written off after the rise of Anthropic’s Claude Code, Cursor now looks to reclaim its crown as a vibe-coding heavyweight with SpaceX’s backing

zh.title: 社交媒体宣布Cursor已死，随后SpaceX向这家AI初创公司提供600亿美元救命钱
zh.summary: SpaceX向被Anthropic的Claude Code击败而被否定的AI编码助手Cursor投资了600亿美元。这笔融资使Cursor能够竞争AI开发工具市场的领导地位。

title: Why the Fed’s hawkish stance signals a step-change in U.S. dollar sentiment — and a new direction
summary: The Federal Reserve's hawkish monetary stance is boosting dollar demand through higher interest rate differentials, strong growth prospects, and capital demand from AI investment. The shift signals a sustained bullish outlook for the U.S. currency.
content: Interest rate differentials, growth prospects, demand for capital from AI investment and bumper stock market issuance is generating demand for the  dollar and a bullish impulse

zh.title: 为什么美联储的鹰派立场预示着美元情绪的质变——以及新方向
zh.summary: 美联储的鹰派货币政策通过更高的利率差异、强劲的增长前景和AI投资带来的资本需求来提高美元需求。这一转变预示着美元持续看涨的前景。

title: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
summary: The U.S. Trade Representative opened a tariff investigation against Germany's pharmaceutical pricing proposals, calling the policy a "serious step backwards." The probe reflects growing trade tensions over healthcare costs and pricing regulations.
content: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."

title: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
summary: Shanghai Disneyland achieved 100 million cumulative visitors and continues to thrive as a strategic foothold for Disney despite broader economic pullbacks in China.
content: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.

title: You can expect gas prices to remain elevated. Here's how to save

title: Five ways the Iran peace deal could affect you and your money
summary: An Iran peace deal has potential economic implications for consumers, with fuel and gas prices already showing signs of decline following the agreement. The article examines five key ways the normalization of relations could influence household finances and energy costs.
content: With fuel and gas prices having fallen in recent days, we look at how the end of hostilities might affect you - in five charts.

title: What's happening to UK petrol and diesel prices now the US and Iran have a deal?
summary: A US-Iran deal may help moderate UK fuel prices that spiked after the February 28 conflict disrupted Middle Eastern energy production and global supply chains.

title: UK gilt yields jump as borrowing rises and PM Starmer faces leadership challenge
summary: UK gilt yields rise as government borrowing increases, while Prime Minister Starmer faces internal political challenges. The shift reflects growing concerns about fiscal pressures and leadership stability within Labour.

title: What this biotech's volatile stock price tells you about the weight loss market right now

title: UK borrowing in May surges by more than expected
summary: UK government borrowing in May surged beyond forecasts, signaling increased fiscal pressure amid higher spending relative to tax revenues.

title: Oil rebounds as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
summary: Oil prices rebound as delayed U.S.-Iran negotiations dampen optimism over Middle East ceasefire progress, though easing supply concerns and renewed tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz provide some price support.
content: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.

summary: Negotiations on a U.S.-Iran accord encounter early setbacks after planned Swiss talks fail to proceed, with analysts warning that lasting Middle East conflict resolution will require extended timelines.
content: Analysts reckon a lasting resolution to the Middle East conflict will take some time to materialize.

title: Farnham sets out 'ambitious' vision for island

title: Indian IT stocks slump up to 7% as Accenture cuts revenue outlook, fueling fresh concerns over sector growth
summary: Indian IT stocks fall up to 7% after global sector leader Accenture cuts revenue guidance, intensifying concerns about near-term growth prospects across the technology services industry.

title: Yen slides past 161 against the dollar, nearing 40-year low and reviving intervention bets
summary: The Japanese yen weakens past 161 per dollar to its lowest level since July 2024, prompting speculation about potential central bank intervention to stabilize the currency.
content: On Thursday the yen saw a sharp depreciation a high of 161.80, its weakest since July 2024.

summary: Index provider MSCI continues scrutinizing Indonesia's stock market, flagging persistent transparency concerns that could threaten market confidence and foreign investment flows.

title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
summary: Despite Japan's $70 billion-plus yen defense intervention and a rate hike, currency weakness persists, raising questions about policy effectiveness against structural economic headwinds.
content: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.

title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
summary: Following a U.S.-Iran agreement to end the Middle East conflict, early signs of regional recovery emerge as shipping traffic resumes in the Strait of Hormuz and daily life normalizes in Tehran.
content: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.

title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
summary: Japan's core inflation held steady in May, matching economist expectations with headline inflation rising to 1.5% while core-core inflation eased to 1.8%. This steady-state reading suggests the Bank of Japan's monetary policy decisions remain on track despite ongoing energy price concerns.
content: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.

zh.title: 日本5月核心通胀保持稳定，符合预期，尽管存在能源价格担忧
zh.summary: 日本5月核心通胀保持稳定，符合经济学家预期，总体通胀率升至1.5%，而核心-核心通胀率缓和至1.8%。这一稳定的数据表明日本央行的货币政策决定保持在正轨上，尽管存在持续的能源价格担忧。

title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
summary: Trump characterized his negotiated Iran peace agreement as "unconditional surrender," claiming his power has "no limits" in handling the diplomatic victory. He stated the deal was necessary to prevent the conflict from triggering a global economic depression.
content: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.

zh.title: 特朗普声称伊朗协议是"无条件投降"，称其权力"无限"：Axios
zh.summary: 特朗普将其谈判达成的伊朗和平协议称为"无条件投降"，声称他在处理这一外交胜利方面的权力"无限"。他表示这项协议对于防止冲突引发全球经济衰退是必要的。

title: South Korea's Kospi extends record run as Asia markets open mixed; Samsung, SK Hynix hit all-time highs
summary: South Korea's Kospi index extended its record-setting run as Asian markets opened with mixed performance, with Samsung and SK Hynix reaching all-time highs. The gains reflect investor optimism about the durability of the U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were set to trade mixed on Friday as investors assessed the durability of a U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.

zh.title: 韩国综合指数延续创纪录走势，亚洲市场开盘涨跌互现；三星、SK海力士创历史新高
zh.summary: 韩国综合指数延续其创纪录的走势，亚洲市场开盘时涨跌互现，三星和SK海力士创历史新高。这些涨幅反映了投资者对美国斡旋的伊朗和平协议耐久性的乐观态度。
